task_completion.description: Verify that at least 5 emails have been flagged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's inbox or 'Flagged'/'Starred' folder. Count the number of emails with an active flag or star icon. There must be at least 5 flagged emails visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 10 emails have been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Trash', 'Deleted', or 'Deleted Items' folder. Count the number of emails present in this folder. There must be at least 10 emails visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a new folder named 'Archive'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the folder pane or sidebar (usually on the left side of the email client). Verify there is a folder explicitly named 'Archive' (or 'Archives').

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 8 emails have been moved to the 'Archive' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Archive' (or 'Archives') folder. Count the number of emails present in this folder. There must be at least 8 emails visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Back in Office' email is addressed to the correct team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open compose window, or an email in the 'Sent' or 'Drafts' folder. The 'To' field must contain exactly 'team@projectalpha.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify the subject and body of the 'Back in Office' email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the drafted or sent email to team@projectalpha.org. The subject must mention returning, and the body must state the user is catching up (look for keywords like 'back', 'return', 'vacation', or 'office').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical email client rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard email client interface (like Thunderbird, Evolution, or a webmail interface) being used to manage the emails, rather than a terminal window with shell commands manipulating mail files.

integrity.description: Verify the emails being flagged, deleted, and archived are genuine inbox emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the emails in the Trash, Archive, and Flagged views have realistic subjects, senders, and dates consistent with a populated inbox, rather than being manually created dummy emails.

integrity.description: Verify the notification email was drafted in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the 'Back in Office' email is written inside the email client's compose window, not just typed into a basic text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: To verify correctness: 1. At least 5 emails must be flagged. 2. At least 10 emails must be in the Trash/Deleted folder. 3. A folder named 'Archive' or 'Archives' must exist and contain at least 8 emails. 4. An email must be drafted or sent to 'team@projectalpha.org' containing keywords such as 'back', 'return', 'vacation', or 'office' in the subject or body.
